INC-1001.author: team-iam
INC-1001.body: Confirmed: SSO callback failing TLS handshake. Investigating cert chain.

INC-1001.author: team-iam
INC-1001.body: New cert was renewed but the intermediate CA bundle is missing on the IdP edge.

INC-1002.author: team-data
INC-1002.body: Bulk-pricing job is taking exclusive locks on line_items. Querying pg_locks now.

INC-1002.author: team-data
INC-1002.body: Confirmed lock contention. Considering pausing the bulk job.

INC-1003.author: team-payments
INC-1003.body: OOMKilled on startup. Heap dump shows fraud-scoring lib loading 600MB model into memory.

INC-1003.author: release-bot
INC-1003.body: Container memory limit unchanged at 512Mi from previous version.

INC-1004.author: team-platform
INC-1004.body: Logging aggregator buffer is filling /var/log because Elasticsearch sink is backpressured.

INC-1005.author: team-payments
INC-1005.body: DNS lookups intermittently fail. CoreDNS forwarder lost connectivity to upstream resolver.

INC-1006.author: team-ml
INC-1006.body: In-memory cache has no max size or TTL. Need an LRU eviction policy.

INC-1007.author: team-data
INC-1007.body: Storage layer shows the file is intact but a row hash differs. Suspecting in-flight write during dump.

INC-1008.author: team-edge
INC-1008.body: Backend connection pool exhausted. Slow downstream call to inventory-service is holding connections.
